series_metadata.series_description: Computer information relative to the Clearinghouse Database and the corresponding labor contracts, addendums, fact-finding reports, conciliation awards, and other documents that it contains. Provides efficient means of tracking, reporting and maintaining information. Summary of major points of agreement reached between the public employer and the union covering employees.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Data extracted from Labor Contracts (Collective Bargaining Agreements) and Addendums are stored in Clearinghouse Database. Beginning in 2012, data extracted from Fact-Finding Reports and Conciliation Awards are stored in Clearinghouse Database along with a PDF copy of document. Beginning in 1995 information regarding Labor Contracts and Addendums are scanned electronically. Current contract and addendum information are available on SERB's website. ; Paper: Paper copy of Labor Contracts, Addendums, Contract Data Summary Sheets, Fact-Finding Reports, Conciliation Awards, Fact-Finding/Conciliation Data Summary Sheets and Annual Employer Information Reports ; Microform: Prior 1995 Contract/Collective Bargaining agreement information is stored on microfilm
retention_rules.disposition_method: Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper ; Microform: Permanent
